languages.text: Посреди разрушенных диорам Лорд-капитан обнаружил друкхарский антиграв-транспорт — такой же, что вознес его к шпилю Опустошающей бури. Вот он, путь к похитителю.

Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.
languages.original_text: Посреди разрушенных диорам Лорд-капитан обнаружил друкхарский антиграв-транспорт — такой же, что вознес его к шпилю Опустошающей бури. Вот он, путь к похитителю.

traits.locale_text: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

languages.text: Zwischen den zerstörten Dioramen entdeckte der Lord Captain die gleichen Transportplattformen, mit denen {mf|er|sie} auf den Turm des plündernden Sturms gelangt war. Endlich ein Hinweis auf den Dieb.
languages.original_text: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

traits.locale_text: Zwischen den zerstörten Dioramen entdeckte der Lord Captain die gleichen Transportplattformen, mit denen {mf|er|sie} auf den Turm des plündernden Sturms gelangt war. Endlich ein Hinweis auf den Dieb.

languages.text: Parmi les dioramas épars, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert un véhicule drukhari anti-gravité identique à celui qui l'avait {mf|mené|menée} au sommet de la tour de la Tempête ravageuse. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a retrouvé la piste du voleur.
languages.original_text: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

traits.locale_text: Parmi les dioramas épars, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert un véhicule drukhari anti-gravité identique à celui qui l'avait {mf|mené|menée} au sommet de la tour de la Tempête ravageuse. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a retrouvé la piste du voleur.

languages.text: 在碎裂的实景模型之间，舰长大人发现了一台黑暗灵族的反重力运输器，与之前将{mf|他|她}送上狂风阴谋团尖塔的那台一模一样。总算找到指向那个窃贼的线索了。
languages.original_text: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

traits.locale_text: 在碎裂的实景模型之间，舰长大人发现了一台黑暗灵族的反重力运输器，与之前将{mf|他|她}送上狂风阴谋团尖塔的那台一模一样。总算找到指向那个窃贼的线索了。

languages.text: Entre los dioramas destrozados, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán ha descubierto un transporte de antigravedad idéntico que el que l{mf|o|a} llevó a la torre de la Tempestad Asoladora. Por fin, el rastro que conduce al ladrón.
languages.original_text: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

traits.locale_text: Entre los dioramas destrozados, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán ha descubierto un transporte de antigravedad idéntico que el que l{mf|o|a} llevó a la torre de la Tempestad Asoladora. Por fin, el rastro que conduce al ladrón.

languages.text: 廃墟と化したジオラマの中で、ロード・キャプテンはドゥルカーの反重力輸送機を見つけた。そこには誘拐犯への道があった。
languages.original_text: In the midst of the ruined dioramas, the Lord Captain found a Drukhar anti-grav transport, the same one that had taken him to the spire of Desolation Storm. There it was, the path to the abductor.

languages.text: Parçalanmış diyoramaların arasında Lord Kaptan, kendisini Müfteris Kasırga Kulesi'ne çıkaranın aynısı olan bir Drukhari yer çekimsiz nakliye aracı keşfetti. Nihayet hırsıza giden iz bulundu.
languages.original_text: Amidst the shattered dioramas, the Lord Captain discovered a Drukhari anti-grav transport identical to the one that has elevated {mf|him|her} to the Spire of the Reaving Tempest. At last, the trail leading to the thief.

traits.locale_text: Parçalanmış diyoramaların arasında Lord Kaptan, kendisini Müfteris Kasırga Kulesi'ne çıkaranın aynısı olan bir Drukhari yer çekimsiz nakliye aracı keşfetti. Nihayet hırsıza giden iz bulundu.
